connect.user.useridentityinfo.CfnAbout: Contains information about the identity of a user.

connect.user.useridentityinfo.Email.Description: The email address. If you are using SAML for identity management and include this parameter, an error is returned.

connect.user.useridentityinfo.FirstName.Description: The first name. This is required if you are using Amazon Connect or SAML for identity management.

connect.user.useridentityinfo.LastName.Description: The last name. This is required if you are using Amazon Connect or SAML for identity management.

connect.user.useridentityinfo.SecondaryE.Description: The user's secondary email address. If you provide a secondary email, the user receives email notifications -- other than password reset notifications -- to this email address instead of to their primary email address.
